---
title: "Research"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 4
---


#### Publications

+ My [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=HOOCmJ0AAAAJ&hl=en) for publications (or check with my [ORCID ID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0085-7181) profile)

#### Reviewer

+ Reliability Engineering & System Safety 

+ Mathematical Biosciences and Engineering 

+ Infectious Disease Modelling 

+ Computational and Applied Mathematics 

+ Communications in Statistics - Theory and Methods 

+ Communications in Statistics - Simulation and Computation 

#### Awards

+ Jiangsu Provincial Double-Innovation Doctor Program, 2022
